commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation nccl-tests-efa-worker-0 -o yaml | grep -E runtime_name\|NVIDIA_VISIBLE\|/dev/nvidia'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio exec -n yanxi-validation nccl-tests-efa-worker-0 -- bash -lc "env | grep -iE nvidia_or_cuda || env | head -15; echo; ls /dev | head -40; echo; ls /proc/driver/ 2>&1"'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get ds -n kube-system nvidia-device-plugin-daemonset -o yaml | grep -E image: | head -3'
